mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.department_name, d.manager_id, d.description, d.status, d.create_time, u.name AS manager_name, IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE department_id = d.id), 0) AS member_count FROM department d LEFT JOIN user u ON d.manager_id = u.id
AND d.department_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
